steps.title: Identify the artistic timeline
steps.content: The prompt asks to connect Save Me to the history of neon in art. The notes establish a specific historical fact: neon became popular with artists in the 1960s and continues today. An effective answer must anchor this 2018 sculpture to that documented lineage.

steps.title: Anchor the sculpture to that lineage
steps.content:
Choice B states that Steele “joins the decades-long lineage of artists who have helped make neon a popular artistic medium since the 1960s,” positioning Save Me within the documented artistic movement.

Choices A and D mention Save Me but lack the historical anchor (A focuses on handmade production, D contradicts the notes about artistic popularity), while C presents the history without connecting it to the sculpture or artist.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
